name: Pineapple Orange Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin in boiling water.
2. Add pineapple and ice cubes to the mixture. Stir until gelatin begins to thicken, about 3-5 minutes.
3. Remove any unmelted ice from the mixture.
4. Chill the mixture until it is thickened but not set.
5. Spoon 1 cup of the thickened gelatin over each cake layer and chill for 15 minutes.
6. Fold whipped topping into the remaining gelatin mixture. If the mixture becomes too thick, add milk until the desired consistency is reached for frosting.
7. Place one cake layer with the gelatin side up on a serving plate.
8. Top with the second cake layer, also with the gelatin side up.
9. Frost the sides and about 1 inch around the top edge of the cake with the whipped topping mixture.
10. Chill until ready to serve.
